rag_rules: Resolve reference errors by ensuring all AGREE nodes are properly declared in visible scopes before use.
Align types in binary expressions to prevent mismatched type errors during AGREE validation.
generic_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referencing ports or features.
Use visible identifiers and named constants to define bounds in assumptions and guarantees.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions, especially for comparisons and arithmetic.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must have matching types on both sides of binary operators like '='.
Component type contracts should reference features through valid variables or outputs, not subcomponent ports.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing undefined AGREE nodes; ensure all identifiers are declared in visible scopes.
Do not mix incompatible types in expressions without explicit conversion or type alignment.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
